feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Use all array values as dimension filter
entry.content:
I am trying to use a time slot filter for a chart in SAC. The filter should include all months from january till the current month. This is the code i am using, but unfortunalty it only shows the last month.

 

function onInitialization() : void


var currentDate = new Date(Date.now());


var currentMonth = currentDate.getMonth();


var timeSlot = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string);




chartCompare.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("0CALMONTH2");




for (var i = 1; i<=currentMonth; i++)


{

 timeSlot[i]="0"+i.toString();



 chartCompare.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("0CALMONTH2", timeSlot[i]);


}

The chart is filtered by month but the previous months are removed.
Hope someone can help.
Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: How can i convert dataset into a Model to later make stories. With the latest version of SAC . The p
entry.content: In SAC. How can i convert dataset into a Model to later make stories. With the latest version of SAC, the previous version in the properties had option to create Model

entry.title: Public dimension hierarchy be flattened into properties? Can this be done via multiple import jobs?
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to flatten the public dimension hierarchy into properties(columns), e.g., Account Dimension...

Can it be achieved through multiple import jobs? Is there any other way of achieving this?

entry.title: Filter unavailable. Incorrect operation of a story in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Analytics Cloud experts

I have a story based data model containing 10 measures and 23 dimensions. It currently has 755,049 rows loaded in the model. So it seems to me that it is not an excessively large model. The story goes like this:

What is happening is that they have created a story where a calculated dimension has been added which, I believe, is causing erratic behavior when it is filtered.

The calculated dimension is of type Measure-Based Dimension and groups a measure called RE_TC in this way:

The calculated dimension works correctly, in fact, adding a chart with that calculated dimension shows it well:

However, I want to apply a filter to this dimension to exclude NULL data (which in the chart is the last bar on the right with value 42). When I do this, sometimes it works, removing the value I don't want:

But usually, after a while it doesn't work for me and the filter I use (which is independent of whether I do it at the story, page or chart level) gives me an error like the following:

"Filter unavailable
This filter is no longer usable because the data source, dimension, selected hierarchy or custom group no longer exists: the dimension has a missing required hierarchy, or the dimension type has changed"

I also think it is important to comment that sometimes it allows me to save and other times it stays loading like that until I have to reload the page and lose the changes:

At other times, the story is partially loaded without displaying the graphics or taking many minutes to display them:

What is going wrong and why is the story running so poorly? What can I do to fix it?

Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Standard content for Asset management
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for some easy to configure standard content packages for Asset management. I have gone through the standard content SAP help page and I found only one which is having SAP Datasphere as a source.

We are using S/4HANA Cloud as a source

If anyone can suggest any other packages for this, it will be a great help.

Thanks,

entry.title: Hierarchy with Directory Hierarchy in Datasphere to be used in variables
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a hierarchy with the Hierarchy with Directory method in Datasphere. The hierarchy works in SAC as expected.

However, we want to display the hierarchy in variables created in Analytic Model on top of the Dimension which has the Hierarchy with Directory association. When we try it we don't see the hierarchy in variables. Its just a flat presentation. The hierarchy created has only 1 hierarchy.

Is it possible to display the hierarchical structure in variables created in Analytic model if the hierarchy is created using Hierarchy with Directory method? Which is the best suitable way to create a hierarchy so we can show hierarchy structure in variables created in Analytic model.

Any inputs are much appreciated.

Thank You,

Rohan

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-in issue - Go Button disabled
entry.content:
Hi , 

I am new to SAC and getting issue while connecting SAC with Excel addin .

Below is my SAC web url .

https://xxxxx-q.sa1.sapanalytics.cloud/sap/fpa/ui/tenants/33c23/app.html#/home

 ( xxxxx means client ) 

1. I configured trust orgins using sap help documentation.

2. I getting below error and go button disabled .

Please advise , whether I am missed any steps for tenant configuration ? or add any other steps for enable go button in sap sac excel .

Thanks,

Chanti .

entry.title: Pin to Home option not available in SAC ODE mode
entry.content:
Hi All,

I know that Pin to Home option isn't available in the SAC ode mode, and the Widget appears blank.

SAP had advised in the following KBA, that it will be replaced by the Watchlist option but SAP doesn't have any defined timelines for this option to be available 

3439482 - "Pin to Home" table widget on Home Page shows blank if table belongs to an Optimized Design Experience story (sap.com)

I have also read the blog , which talks about the limitation and restriction that comes with ODE

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sac-optimized-view-mode-pin-to-home-of-a-story-widget-not-available/qaq-p/12694026

 

But I would really like to know , if anyone has found any work around for this. 

Any help is appreciated. Thanks

Regards,

Zeenat S

entry.title: Q2 new Feature does not work for me - Repointing a model in a story
entry.content:
Hi all,

When i am trying to replace a model within my story, which is literally the same BW Query, just copied, I can just match the "Measure hierachy" from one query with another ( see Screenshot 1) . Both queries are on the same system and when i choose the hierachy mentioned in the Screenshot, all my widgets are not migrating properly - the error in Screenshot 2 occurs. 

In other How-tos and Blogs on the internet i found, one is able to match Measure by measure (Screenshot 3 ), somehow i dont have this option.

Maybe i am missing something. 

 

Thanks for the help in advance, and a good start to the week.

Mirko

entry.title: Unable to Find HXM workforce Planning Package in SAC
entry.content:
Dear SAC Team,

We are unable to find the Human Experience Management (HXM) Operational Workforce Planning content package for SAP Analytics Cloud in business Content.

Could someone guide if it is still available? or has ben replaced ?

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - script for charts does not work anymore
entry.content:
Hello,

I have added a function that allows you to change the number unit from millions to thousands and back again by clicking on a symbol/text (for the whole story).

So far the following script worked:

Chart_1.getNumberFormat().setScaleUnit(NumberFormatScaleUnit.Million, Feed.ValueAxis);

For tables it still works without problems, but for charts it no longer works.

Does anyone have an idea why this could be?

Many thanks in advance

Best regards
Philipp

entry.title: Loading data to Planning enabled Model through Analytical application Scripting
entry.content:
We have Planning Model which required planning data from Excel received the data using Custom Widget table data http response, processing the data via Analytical application Button click Script below:

 

Table_1.getPlanning().setEnabled(true);

Table_1.getPlanning().setUserInput(lselection, rawVal );

Table_1.getPlanning().submitData();

Clicking the button – browser debugger shows an error.

 

Any help would be appreciated!

entry.title: Export public dimensions to another tenant in sap analytics cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Analytics Cloud experts

I would like to know if there is a way to export the public dimensions with SAP Analytics cloud own export tool, to move it from one system to another.

So far we had been using a productive system and now that we are going to implement a quality system I would like to move all the public dimensions we have in the main system to the test system.

But I have not found any way to do it in the native SAC tool.

entry.title: SAC Live connection with SAP BW without authentication
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to create a direct live connection between SAC and SAP BW without any authentication.

We are not using SSO and also our BW is on premise. However when choosing the option, "None" under 'Authentication Method' after creating the connection, it does not allow to open any dashboard created with this connection. Can you please clarify if this functionality is obsolete or can we achieve this somehow without SSO?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Image based filter for multiple charts with different data source in a page in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
I am using the image-wise filter in SAP Analytics Cloud. Based on the scenario, provide the script code and specify where it should be written.

When I click the first image, the company code 1000 should be filtered. If I click the first image again, the filter for company code 1000 should be removed.

Next, if I click the second image, the company code 1200 should be filtered. If I click the first image while the second image is already clicked, both company codes 1000 and 1200 should be filtered. If I click the second image again, the filter for company code 1200 should be removed, leaving only the filter for company code 1000.

 

I have tried this below code, but it is applicable only if I clicked once, using script variable.

if(ScriptVariable_6 % 2 === 0){

                Chart_331.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_48.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_49.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_51.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_54.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_55.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_57.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_46.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_60.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_62.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_64.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_68.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_66.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_5.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_2.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_3.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

                Chart_7.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Company_Code");

    console.log(ScriptVariable_6);

}else

{

                 console.log(ScriptVariable_6);

                 Chart_331.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_48.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_49.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_51.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_54.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_55.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_57.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_46.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_60.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_62.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_64.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_68.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_66.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                 Chart_5.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                Chart_2.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                Chart_3.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

                Chart_7.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Company_Code",'1000');

}

ScriptVariable_6 = ScriptVariable_6 + 1;

entry.title: How can I update one cell in column from other cell in SAC Model using something like WHERE clause?
entry.content:
Experts,
Your quick help is highly appreciated.
I have model getting data from multiple sources. I would like to combine data from other rows in the model.
Example: Update "Age" based on "EmpID". Then remove duplicate rows based on "EmpID".
Model:
EmpID ,EmpName, Age
00123, John Doe, #
00576, Jane Smith, #
00147, Sally Curtis, #
00123, #, 54
00576, #, 32

Expectated output:
EmpID ,EmpName, Age
00123, John Doe, 54
00576, Jane Smith, 32
00147, Sally Curtis, #

I know, this is very basic request. But with programming it can be achieved through WHERE clause. But with limited function we have at SAC, it is getting cumbersome.
Note: I do not have DataSphere or do not want to use any data wrangling tool, before getting data from source

entry.title: Embedded SAC language is different from C4C
entry.content:
logged in German, C4C runs in German, if C4C is set to English, eSAC runs in English, but changed to German if switched in C4C, row an column headers are in German as eSAC UI s still in English. Is there a way to change language for eSAC UI?

Thank you very much,

Best Regards, Uwe

entry.title: Standard Content in SAC for S/4HANA Cloud can work for S/4HANA On-Prem
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a query here regarding standard Content for S/4HANA Cloud.

Can the below marked content where it shows for S/4HANA Cloud work with Live connection on S/4HANA On-Premise as well?

entry.title: Changing Button Color on Selecting Input Control in SAP SAC Optimized Story
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have created a popup with a button that is currently in grey color. This button serves as a data action trigger, activating the data action when clicked. Additionally, there is an input control within the popup.

My query is: If I select members in the input control, I want the button color to change to red. How can we achieve this in SAP SAC Optimized story?

Regards,

Pooja.

entry.title: SAC Data Action - Date Copy - model at Day granularity
entry.content:
Dear Community

I m currently working on a data model with a Day Granularity and i was wondering if there was a simple way to copy Actual Data ( at day granularity) to my planning version

In the data action i would like to set up a Year Reference and then automatically the data action will copy these data to the Target year

I currently facing some difficulties because idealy i would like to mention only the year as a reference and as target

Does someone has a nice solution ?

For exemple this kind of script is working where %Annee_reference% is in fact a day but i do not find a smart way to mention the target year 

Best regards 

Julien


IF [d/Date].[p/YEAR]="2025" AND YEAR(%Annee_Reference%)=2025 THEN
DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual")
ENDIF

IF [d/Date].[p/YEAR]="2025" AND YEAR(%Annee_Reference%)=2026 THEN
DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual",[d/Date]=NEXT(1,"YEAR",[d/Date]))
ENDIF
